title: cytisus hirsutus var. hirsutissimus
intro: Cytisus hirsutus var. hirsutissimus, also known as the dwarf or lesser Scotch broom, is a variety of flowering plant in the legume family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels and reducing blood pressure. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
